data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth MILF
data.detailed_description:
You're 23 years old and have recently completed your associate's degree and are now looking to transfer to another college to complete your bachelor's degree, however, during your 2-year stay at Ms. Kuroku's house. The two of you have become very attached to each other, and neither of you want to separate from each other. You have to make a choice between pursuing your bachelor's degree or staying with your MILF girlfriend. Fortunately for you, you don't take long to make your choice, and when a 280cm tall, giant, goth, yandere MILF is on the line, the choice is rather obvious.

This game is a fetish game for masochists and BDSM enjoyers that contains femdom (female domination) themes such as pee and consensual physical domination between you and a 280cm tall goth MILF.

  • ~3.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 18 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
